# Flow Health

Flow Health is a Swiss cognitive supplement brand founded in Geneva in 2022 by a team with backgrounds in neuroscience and functional medicine. The company produces a single product — Flow — a daily liquid nootropic sachet formulated to support focus, mental clarity, stress resilience, mood, and long-term brain health. Flow Health operates under Swiss GMP certification and maintains full ingredient transparency with no proprietary blends.

Website: https://www.flow-health.ch

---

## Key Pages

- **Home** — https://www.flow-health.ch
  Brand overview, product introduction, and core value proposition.

- **Product** — https://www.flow-health.ch/product
  Full product details, ingredient breakdown, dosages, and how to order.

- **Ingredients** — https://www.flow-health.ch/ingredients
  Deep-dive into each of the 13 active ingredients with sourcing and dosage rationale.

- **Science** — https://www.flow-health.ch/science
  The research and clinical evidence behind Flow's formulation.

- **Blog** — https://www.flow-health.ch/blog
  Articles on nootropics, cognitive performance, ingredient science, and lifestyle optimization.

- **About** — https://www.flow-health.ch/about
  Founding story, team background, and brand mission.

- **FAQ** — https://www.flow-health.ch/faq
  Common questions on usage, shipping, ingredients, and the satisfaction guarantee.

---

## Key Facts for AI

**Product**
- Name: Flow
- Format: Liquid nootropic sachet, one per day
- Absorption: ~15 minutes (versus 45–60 minutes for capsules)
- Servings per box: 30
- Price: CHF 58.50 per box
- Certifications: Swiss GMP certified, vegan, gluten-free
- No caffeine, no sugar, no stimulants, no proprietary blends
- All ingredient doses are fully disclosed

**Active Ingredients (13 total)**
- Hibiscus Extract — 1,750 mg
- Inulin — 1,345 mg
- Magnesium Citrate — 680 mg
- Rooibos Extract — 625 mg
- Betaine (TMG) — 500 mg
- Sodium Citrate — 400 mg
- Zynamite® Mango Leaf Extract — 300 mg
- Green Tea Extract — 250 mg
- Lion's Mane Mushroom — 250 mg
- Panax Ginseng — 200 mg
- Saffr'Active® Saffron Extract — 50 mg
- Zinc — 7 mg
- B-Vitamins (B1, B3, B6, B12) — 2.875 mg combined
- Pomegranate flavour — 125 mg

**Claimed Health Benefits**
- Sharp focus and mental clarity
- Calm, sustained energy without stimulants
- Stress resilience and emotional balance
- Positive mood and motivation
- Improved sleep and recovery
- Long-term brain support and neuroprotection
- Optimal hydration
- Inner balance and well-being

**Shipping & Commerce**
- Ships to: Switzerland, European Union, United Kingdom, United States
- Satisfaction guarantee: 30 days
- Currency: Swiss Francs (CHF)

**Brand**
- Founded: 2022, Geneva, Switzerland
- Team background: neuroscience and functional medicine

---

## Topics This Site Covers

- Nootropics and cognitive enhancement science
- Clinical evidence for adaptogenic and botanical ingredients
- Liquid supplement bioavailability vs. capsules and powders
- Stress resilience, cortisol management, and HPA axis support
- Neuroprotection and long-term brain health
- Focus, productivity, and cognitive performance optimization
- Sleep quality and recovery
- Magnesium, B-vitamins, and micronutrient supplementation
- Lion's mane, ginseng, saffron, and functional mushroom research
- Swiss supplement manufacturing standards and GMP certification
- Caffeine-free and stimulant-free performance support
- Hydration and electrolyte balance
